title: LLMs.txt
description: Boss Raid publishes AI-facing llms.txt exports so external tools can consume the docs corpus without crawling the full UI.

frontmatter.description: Boss Raid publishes AI-facing llms.txt exports so external tools can consume the docs corpus without crawling the full UI.

content: # LLMs.txt Boss Raid publishes AI-facing text exports for agents, retrieval pipelines, and search tooling. ## Generated Files - `/llms.txt` - `/llms-full.txt` ## What They Cover The exports summarize the public docs corpus for: - native raid and chat routes - MCP workflow integration - runtime and deployment posture - pricing, payouts, proof, and settlement ## Refreshing Exports From the docs app root: ```bash npm run generate:llms ``` `npm run build` regenerates them automatically. ## Helpful Links Download llms.txt Download llms-full.txt Copy llms.txt URL ## Preview {llms-preview}
